demo.title: deploy-any-contract.ts

setup: Install: install the deploy-any-contract skill from https://github.com/BankrBot/skills/tree/main/deploy-any-contract
Configure a signer: set PRIVATE_KEY (any wallet that can send a normal tx works — Bankr's submit_raw_transaction included: to = the factory, data = deploy(initCode), value = fee())
Build initCode = creation bytecode with ABI-encoded constructor args appended, then run the demo
Read fee() first and send exactly that value unless your constructor is payable
